assertionResults.fullName: plannerCanvasUnits returns value unchanged for normal canvas cm range (< 1000)
assertionResults.title: returns value unchanged for normal canvas cm range (< 1000)

assertionResults.fullName: plannerCanvasUnits divides by 10 when value >= 1000 (legacy mm stored in cm field)
assertionResults.title: divides by 10 when value >= 1000 (legacy mm stored in cm field)

assertionResults.fullName: plannerCanvasUnits divides by 10 when paired value >= 1000
assertionResults.title: divides by 10 when paired value >= 1000

assertionResults.fullName: plannerCanvasUnits clamps to 1 when value <= 0
assertionResults.title: clamps to 1 when value <= 0

assertionResults.fullName: shapePropsToCanvasCm passes through normal catalog cm values
assertionResults.title: passes through normal catalog cm values

assertionResults.fullName: shapePropsToCanvasCm auto-repairs legacy mm values (>= 1000)
assertionResults.title: auto-repairs legacy mm values (>= 1000)

assertionResults.fullName: normalizeCatalogMm converts catalog cm to mm (× 10)
assertionResults.title: converts catalog cm to mm (× 10)

assertionResults.fullName: normalizeCatalogMm P4-06: widthMm from catalog item / 10 ≈ canvas cm width
assertionResults.title: P4-06: widthMm from catalog item / 10 ≈ canvas cm width

assertionResults.fullName: catalogMmToCanvasCm converts real-world mm to canvas cm
assertionResults.title: converts real-world mm to canvas cm

assertionResults.fullName: moduleLengthMmFromItem extracts module length from name (1200mm) → 1200
assertionResults.title: extracts module length from name (1200mm) → 1200

assertionResults.fullName: moduleLengthMmFromItem extracts 1350mm from name
assertionResults.title: extracts 1350mm from name

assertionResults.fullName: moduleLengthMmFromItem falls back to widthMm/seatCount when no mm in name
assertionResults.title: falls back to widthMm/seatCount when no mm in name

assertionResults.fullName: straightWorkstationFootprintMm NS 4-seater 1200mm → L=4800, D=600
assertionResults.title: NS 4-seater 1200mm → L=4800, D=600

assertionResults.fullName: straightWorkstationFootprintMm SH 2-seater 1200mm → L=2400, D=1200
assertionResults.title: SH 2-seater 1200mm → L=2400, D=1200

assertionResults.fullName: straightWorkstationFootprintMm 1-seater → L equals one module length
assertionResults.title: 1-seater → L equals one module length

assertionResults.fullName: resolveCatalogPlacementFootprintMm 4-seater desk uses bay × module length, not single module
assertionResults.title: 4-seater desk uses bay × module length, not single module

assertionResults.fullName: resolveCatalogPlacementFootprintMm storage item uses normalized catalog cm fields
assertionResults.title: storage item uses normalized catalog cm fields

assertionResults.fullName: catalogFootprintToCanvasUnits converts 4800×600 mm to 480×60 canvas units
assertionResults.title: converts 4800×600 mm to 480×60 canvas units

assertionResults.fullName: millimetersToCatalogCmFields converts 2400×600 mm to 240×60 catalog cm fields
assertionResults.title: converts 2400×600 mm to 240×60 catalog cm fields

assertionResults.fullName: managedProductRowToCatalogItem maps active managed product with real mm footprint
assertionResults.title: maps active managed product with real mm footprint

assertionResults.fullName: managedProductRowToCatalogItem returns null for inactive products
assertionResults.title: returns null for inactive products

assertionResults.fullName: mergeWorkspaceCatalogItems managed item with same id overrides static catalog entry
assertionResults.title: managed item with same id overrides static catalog entry
